task_statement: P5e broad checker fixture consolidation for mandatory declared_gate_refs after P5c production changes.
selection_rule: manual narrow checker-fixture graph because P5d exposed a second out-of-scope fixture failure; this Building searches support/checkers fixtures for all ordinary Link rows that must explicitly declare default-transition.

nodes.work_statement:
Fix all checker fixture fallout from P5c mandatory declared_gate_refs. Current main includes P5c production changes. check_profile.py --all first failed in support/checkers/lib/adapter_capability_checks.py fixtures, then in support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py chat_session_park_seam fixtures, because synthetic Link rows omitted declared_gate_refs and now fail before their intended negative assertion. Update checker fixture plans only so ordinary synthetic Link rows explicitly declare ["link-gate:default-transition"] before testing unrelated adapter/chat/session/write-scope behavior. Preserve the deliberate missing-declared_gate_refs RED probes added by P5c; do not add gate refs to those negative controls. Search support/checkers for Link rows in generated plans that omit declared_gate_refs and would mask intended assertions. Run py_compile changed checker files, focused profiles agent_axis_behavioral/building_automation/bounded_agent_proposed_routing_loop/link_routing_behavioral as relevant, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all. Return exact changed_files, command rc outcomes, and not_proven.

STRICT SCOPE: P5 checker fixture consolidation after mandatory declared_gate_refs. Do not change production Link/operator semantics. Do not weaken P5c plan_validation or invalid-concern source-HOLD behavior. Do not push. No ai-cli MCP/helpers/subagents. Movement vocabulary remains forward/reroute; HOLD is lifecycle. Checker green is support evidence only.

QA P5e fixture consolidation. Verify changes are checker-fixture-only under support/checkers, not production operator/Link behavior. Confirm deliberate P5c missing declared_gate_refs RED probes remain intact, ordinary fixture plans now explicitly declare default-transition, and check_profile.py --all is green. Return concern targeting work if any failure remains.

STRICT SCOPE: P5 checker fixture consolidation after mandatory declared_gate_refs. Do not change production Link/operator semantics. Do not weaken P5c plan_validation or invalid-concern source-HOLD behavior. Do not push. No ai-cli MCP/helpers/subagents. Movement vocabulary remains forward/reroute; HOLD is lifecycle. Checker green is support evidence only.

Close P5e. Done condition: check_profile.py --all green on main+P5c+P5e diff; changed files in support/checkers/** only; no weakening of P5c production invariants. Report observed_evidence/narrowly_proven/not_proven/next_target_candidates. If gap remains, emit Link-facing concern targeting work.
